title: Cash Shop Update for May 6
author: Global MapleStory
summary: “Cash Shop Update for May 6” is an official Cash Shop notice from Global MapleStory Official News on 2026-05-05. Its canonical Nexon article and publication metadata are retained for source-backed verification.
